hooks.command:
echo 'CRITICAL RULES AFTER COMPACTION (rowie-app):
1. NEVER run git commands
2. All <Text> MUST have maxFontSizeMultiplier (>=24: 1.2, 17-23: 1.3, <=16 in buttons: 1.3, <=16 body: 1.5)
3. All interactive elements MUST have accessibilityRole + accessibilityLabel (Apple TTPOi requirement)
4. NEVER hardcode prices — use PRICING from src/lib/pricing.ts
5. Never use pure #000000 — use #1C1917 (stone-900) or #0C0A09 (stone-950)
6. Socket handlers: define useCallback OUTSIDE useSocketEvent, never inline. Never include derived values (orders.length etc) in deps
7. Context provider values MUST be wrapped in useMemo
8. List item components MUST be wrapped with memo()
9. All hooks called BEFORE any early return statements
10. Use setState callback pattern to avoid stale closures
11. Monetary: use fromSmallestUnit/toSmallestUnit/formatCurrency — never raw /100 or *100. Never hardcode "$" — use getCurrencySymbol(currency)
12. Touch targets minimum 44x44pt. Use SafeAreaView from react-native-safe-area-context
13. User-facing: say "menu" not "catalog"
14. After renaming anything: grep entire codebase for old name'
